footer.description: A trusted Japanese vocational training institution to help you achieve your dream of working in Japan.

landing.title: Turn Your Dream of Studying & Working in Japan into Reality
landing.description: With Yayasan Jissho, we prepare you through quality Japanese language learning, professional work culture training, and career guidance to succeed in Japan.

about.title: Why Choose
about.description: We believe that thorough preparation is the key to success. Through intensive training programs covering language and professional work ethics, we help you compete globally and adapt quickly to Japan’s work environment.

program.title: Our
program.description: Various programs to help you achieve your dream of working, interning, or studying in Japan.

blog.title: Latest Insights
blog.description: Explore exclusive articles about Japanese learning methods, work document preparation, and inspiring stories from Yayasan Jissho alumni.

register.title: Build a Global Career
register.description: Intensive language training, official job placement, and full support until departure. Start your successful journey to Japan today!
